What it does

A full signal engine.
Zero complexity.

01

7-Indicator Engine

RSI, MACD, EMA 50/200, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ATR, and Volume — all confluenced into one signal.

Live
02

Smart Renko Filter

ATR-based brick tracker with EMA 30 trend blanket (Chaadar) eliminates noise and clarifies trend direction.

Live
03

Lorentzian ML Classifier

KNN (k=8) predictor using Lorentzian distance with RSI, CCI, and ADX features for higher accuracy.

Beta
04

Gamma Squeeze Window

Intraday 12:30–13:30 IST range detection with 1:30–2:30 PM entry trigger for momentum plays.

Beta
05

Nifty 50 Screener

Scan the entire Nifty 50 by strategy — Momentum, Swing, Breakout, or Value+Trend — scored 0–100.

Live
06

Portfolio Tracker

Add holdings, enter buy prices, and watch live P&L update every 15 seconds. Saved in your browser.

Live
Built with

Serious tech.
Zero dev team.

Built solo — no team, no budget — as a live experiment in AI-enabled product delivery.

FastAPI Backend
Python 3.11 Core
Vanilla JS Frontend
Yahoo Finance Market Data
TradingView Charts
Gemini 1.5 Flash AI Commentary

Telegram Bot Alerts
Render Hosting
